raw_question: 2025年的财务数据怎么样？ | 2025年第三季度，66家中药上市公司的营业总收入、净利润均值分别是多少？与2024年同期相比增长率如何？
raw_question_json: [{"Q":"2025年的财务数据怎么样？"},{"Q":"2025年第三季度，66家中药上市公司的营业总收入、净利润均值分别是多少？与2024年同期相比增长率如何？"}]

query_plan.question: 2025年第三季度，66家中药上市公司的营业总收入、净利润均值分别是多少？与2024年同期相比增长率如何？

sql: WITH current_period AS ( SELECT AVG(total_operating_revenue) AS avg_total_operating_revenue_curr, AVG(net_profit) AS avg_net_profit_curr FROM financials_view WHERE report_period = '2025Q3'), previous_period AS ( SELECT AVG(total_operating_revenue) AS avg_total_operating_revenue_prev, AVG(net_profit) AS avg_net_profit_prev FROM financials_view WHERE report_period = '2024Q3') SELECT avg_total_operating_revenue_curr, avg_net_profit_curr, ROUND(((avg_total_operating_revenue_curr - avg_total_operating_revenue_prev) / ABS(avg_total_operating_revenue_prev)) * 100, 2) AS total_operating_revenue_yoy_growth, ROUND(((avg_net_profit_curr - avg_net_profit_prev) / ABS(avg_net_profit_prev)) * 100, 2) AS net_profit_yoy_growth FROM current_period CROSS JOIN previous_period WHERE avg_total_operating_revenue_prev IS NOT NULL AND avg_total_operating_revenue_prev != 0 AND avg_net_profit_prev IS NOT NULL AND avg_net_profit_prev != 0
sql_history: WITH current_period AS ( SELECT AVG(total_operating_revenue) AS avg_total_operating_revenue_curr, AVG(net_profit) AS avg_net_profit_curr FROM financials_view WHERE report_period = '2025Q3'), previous_period AS ( SELECT AVG(total_operating_revenue) AS avg_total_operating_revenue_prev, AVG(net_profit) AS avg_net_profit_prev FROM financials_view WHERE report_period = '2024Q3') SELECT avg_total_operating_revenue_curr, avg_net_profit_curr, ROUND(((avg_total_operating_revenue_curr - avg_total_operating_revenue_prev) / ABS(avg_total_operating_revenue_prev)) * 100, 2) AS total_operating_revenue_yoy_growth, ROUND(((avg_net_profit_curr - avg_net_profit_prev) / ABS(avg_net_profit_prev)) * 100, 2) AS net_profit_yoy_growth FROM current_period CROSS JOIN previous_period WHERE avg_total_operating_revenue_prev IS NOT NULL AND avg_total_operating_revenue_prev != 0 AND avg_net_profit_prev IS NOT NULL AND avg_net_profit_prev != 0

A.content: 请问您想了解2025年哪个具体的财务指标呢？比如营业总收入、净利润，还是其他指标？

turn_answers.Q: 2025年第三季度，66家中药上市公司的营业总收入、净利润均值分别是多少？与2024年同期相比增长率如何？

A.content: 2025年第三季度，66家中药上市公司的平均营业总收入约为40.01亿元，平均净利润约为4.29亿元。与2024年同期相比，平均营业总收入下降了1.28%，平均净利润下降了0.54%。
